---
mode: agent
agent: stakeholder-communicator-reporter
description: Draft a short, clear milestone completion announcement for stakeholders.
---

# Milestone Announcement

Draft an announcement for a completed milestone.

## Input

```
{{milestone_info}}
```

*(describe the milestone, when it was completed, what it enables, and who the audience is)*

---

## What to do

1. Open with a clear, specific subject line
2. State what was achieved and when
3. Explain in one sentence why this matters (user impact or business value)
4. Mention what comes next
5. Keep it under 100 words

## Output Format

---
**Subject:** [Project Name]: [Milestone Name] Completed

[Date]

[1–2 sentences: what was done and when]

[1 sentence: why it matters]

[1 sentence: what happens next]

Regards,
[PM Name]

---

> Milestone announcements should feel like news, not project management updates. Make it worth reading.
